languages.text: {n}Собрав дань псайкеров с протектората и сковав их цепями, зарковцы начали выманивать Погонщиц из своих логовищ и планомерно истреблять чудищ одно за другим. Многие группы сгинули из-за псайкеров, которые не смогли обуздать свои силы, прорвав вуаль в Имматериум, но вскоре популяция тварей значительно сократилась.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Собрав дань псайкеров с протектората и сковав их цепями, зарковцы начали выманивать Погонщиц из своих логовищ и планомерно истреблять чудищ одно за другим. Многие группы сгинули из-за псайкеров, которые не смогли обуздать свои силы, прорвав вуаль в Имматериум, но вскоре популяция тварей значительно сократилась.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Having gathered a tithe of psykers from across the protectorate and bound them in chains, the Zarkovians began luring the Drovers from their lairs, systematically exterminating the beasts one by one. Many teams were lost to psykers who could not contain their own powers, tearing the veil open to the Immaterium. Nevertheless, before long, the creatures' population was greatly diminished.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Собрав дань псайкеров с протектората и сковав их цепями, зарковцы начали выманивать Погонщиц из своих логовищ и планомерно истреблять чудищ одно за другим. Многие группы сгинули из-за псайкеров, которые не смогли обуздать свои силы, прорвав вуаль в Имматериум, но вскоре популяция тварей значительно сократилась.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Having gathered a tithe of psykers from across the protectorate and bound them in chains, the Zarkovians began luring the Drovers from their lairs, systematically exterminating the beasts one by one. Many teams were lost to psykers who could not contain their own powers, tearing the veil open to the Immaterium. Yet before long, the creature population was greatly diminished.{/n}

{n}Having gathered a tithe of psykers from across the protectorate and bound them in chains, the Zarkovians began luring the Drovers from their lairs, systematically exterminating the beasts one by one. Many teams were lost to psykers who could not contain their own powers, tearing the veil open to the Immaterium. Nevertheless, before long, the creatures' population was greatly diminished.{/n}

{n}After several attempts, the Merovians developed a strategy of mobile diversionary units. They learned how to vanish from the point where the psyker left the warp echo long before any Drovers appeared. Known as "the runners," these units became havens for the foolhardy souls of Zarkov.{/n}

{n}Having gathered a tithe of psykers from across the protectorate and bound them in chains, the Zarkovians began luring the Drovers from their lairs, systematically exterminating the beasts one by one. Many teams were lost to psykers who could not contain their own powers, tearing the veil open to the Immaterium. Yet before long, the creature population was greatly diminished.{/n}

{n}Having gathered a tithe of psykers from across the protectorate and bound them in chains, the Zarkovians began luring the Drovers from their lairs, systematically exterminating the beasts one by one. Many teams were lost to psykers who could not contain their own powers, tearing the veil open to the Immaterium. Nevertheless, before long, the creatures' population was greatly diminished.{/n}

languages.text: {n}数々の試行錯誤を経て、メロヴィアンは機動的な誘導部隊の戦略を確立した。彼らは、ドローバーが到着するずっと前に、サイカーがワープ・エコーを消した地点から姿を消す方法を学んだ。この部隊は「ランナー」と呼ばれ、ザルコフの無謀な魂たちの避難所となった。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After several attempts, the Merovians developed a strategy of mobile diversionary units. They learned how to vanish from the point where the psyker left the warp echo long before any Drovers appeared. Known as "the runners," these units became havens for the foolhardy souls of Zarkov.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}数々の試行錯誤を経て、メロヴィアンは機動的な誘導部隊の戦略を確立した。彼らは、ドローバーが到着するずっと前に、サイカーがワープ・エコーを消した地点から姿を消す方法を学んだ。この部隊は「ランナー」と呼ばれ、ザルコフの無謀な魂たちの避難所となった。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tras reunir un gran número de psíquicos de todo el protectorado y encadenarlos, los zarkovianos comenzaron a atraer a los Pastores desde sus guaridas, exterminando sistemáticamente a las bestias una tras otra. Muchos equipos cayeron frente a las habilidades de los psíquicos, que, incapaces de contenerse, abrían el velo al Inmaterio. No obstante, pronto la población de las criaturas quedó muy reducida.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Having gathered a tithe of psykers from across the protectorate and bound them in chains, the Zarkovians began luring the Drovers from their lairs, systematically exterminating the beasts one by one. Many teams were lost to psykers who could not contain their own powers, tearing the veil open to the Immaterium. Nevertheless, before long, the creatures' population was greatly diminished.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tras reunir un gran número de psíquicos de todo el protectorado y encadenarlos, los zarkovianos comenzaron a atraer a los Pastores desde sus guaridas, exterminando sistemáticamente a las bestias una tras otra. Muchos equipos cayeron frente a las habilidades de los psíquicos, que, incapaces de contenerse, abrían el velo al Inmaterio. No obstante, pronto la población de las criaturas quedó muy reducida.{/n}

languages.text: {n}扎尔科夫人从整个属地征集了一批作为什一税的灵能者，并将他们锁上镣铐，用以引诱拒生花离开巢穴，继而有条不紊地将这些野兽逐个歼灭。由于部分灵能者无法控制自身力量，撕裂了现实与亚空间之间的障壁，导致许多部队全军覆没。然而不久后，拒生花的数量就已被大幅削减。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Having gathered a tithe of psykers from across the protectorate and bound them in chains, the Zarkovians began luring the Drovers from their lairs, systematically exterminating the beasts one by one. Many teams were lost to psykers who could not contain their own powers, tearing the veil open to the Immaterium. Nevertheless, before long, the creatures' population was greatly diminished.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}扎尔科夫人从整个属地征集了一批作为什一税的灵能者，并将他们锁上镣铐，用以引诱拒生花离开巢穴，继而有条不紊地将这些野兽逐个歼灭。由于部分灵能者无法控制自身力量，撕裂了现实与亚空间之间的障壁，导致许多部队全军覆没。然而不久后，拒生花的数量就已被大幅削减。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nachdem sie zahllose Psioniker aus allen Teilen des Protektorats zusammengetrieben und in Ketten gelegt hatten, lockten die Zarkovianer die Treiber aus ihren Verstecken, um die Bestien systematisch zu töten. Viele Teams fielen Psionikern zum Opfer, die ihre eigenen Kräfte nicht kontrollieren konnten und den Schleier des Immateriums zerfetzten. Trotzdem konnte die Population der Kreaturen in kurzer Zeit drastisch reduziert werden.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Having gathered a tithe of psykers from across the protectorate and bound them in chains, the Zarkovians began luring the Drovers from their lairs, systematically exterminating the beasts one by one. Many teams were lost to psykers who could not contain their own powers, tearing the veil open to the Immaterium. Nevertheless, before long, the creatures' population was greatly diminished.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nachdem sie zahllose Psioniker aus allen Teilen des Protektorats zusammengetrieben und in Ketten gelegt hatten, lockten die Zarkovianer die Treiber aus ihren Verstecken, um die Bestien systematisch zu töten. Viele Teams fielen Psionikern zum Opfer, die ihre eigenen Kräfte nicht kontrollieren konnten und den Schleier des Immateriums zerfetzten. Trotzdem konnte die Population der Kreaturen in kurzer Zeit drastisch reduziert werden.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Zarkovlular, protektoranın dört bir yanından aşar şeklinde ruhsezer toplayıp onları zincire vurduktan sonra Çobanları inlerinden çıkarmaya ve yaratıkları sistematik olarak birer birer yok etmeye başladı. Birçok ekip, kendi güçlerini kontrol edemeyen ve örtüyü yırtan ruhsezerler nedeniyle kaybedildi. Yine de çok geçmeden yaratıklar nüfusu büyük ölçüde azaldı.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Having gathered a tithe of psykers from across the protectorate and bound them in chains, the Zarkovians began luring the Drovers from their lairs, systematically exterminating the beasts one by one. Many teams were lost to psykers who could not contain their own powers, tearing the veil open to the Immaterium. Nevertheless, before long, the creatures' population was greatly diminished.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Zarkovlular, protektoranın dört bir yanından aşar şeklinde ruhsezer toplayıp onları zincire vurduktan sonra Çobanları inlerinden çıkarmaya ve yaratıkları sistematik olarak birer birer yok etmeye başladı. Birçok ekip, kendi güçlerini kontrol edemeyen ve örtüyü yırtan ruhsezerler nedeniyle kaybedildi. Yine de çok geçmeden yaratıklar nüfusu büyük ölçüde azaldı.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Après avoir rassemblé des psykers provenant de tout le protectorat et les avoir enchaînés, les Zarkoviens se mirent à débusquer les Chasseurs de leurs antres, en les exterminant méthodiquement un à un. De nombreuses escouades périrent à cause de psykers incapables de contenir leurs pouvoirs, créant ainsi des brèches vers l'Immaterium. Toutefois, cela permit de réduire drastiquement le nombre de ces créatures.{/n}

Many teams were lost to psykers who could not contain their own powers, tearing the veil open to the Immaterium. Nevertheless, before long, the creatures' population was greatly diminished.{/n}

De nombreuses escouades périrent à cause de psykers incapables de contenir leurs pouvoirs, créant ainsi des brèches vers l'Immaterium.
